path.description: Path to the file. May be absolute (when it lives inside one of the configured allowed_paths) or relative to one of them.

start_line.description: Optional 1-indexed inclusive start line for a line-range read. Omit (or pair with end_line) to read the whole file. Combined with end_line: returned slice is lines [start_line, end_line]. Without end_line: returned slice is lines [start_line, EOF]. Supported for UTF-8 text files only; binary files reject any line-range argument.

end_line.description: Optional 1-indexed inclusive end line for a line-range read. Omit (or pair with start_line) to read the whole file. Combined with start_line: returned slice is lines [start_line, end_line]. Without start_line: returned slice is lines [1, end_line]. If end_line exceeds the file's line count, it is silently clamped to the last line. Supported for UTF-8 text files only; binary files reject any line-range argument.
